# PT-BR fixture for /pirata IMDb lookup validation (Phase 1 R5 calibration).
# Format: title<TAB>year<TAB>kind<TAB>expected_tconst   # comment
# Empty cell = "-" (None at lookup time). One title per line.
#
# Goal: top-1 lookup_by_title(title, year, kind) resolves to expected tconst
# with fuzz_ratio >= 80. Failures drive (a) RapidFuzz cutoff calibration,
# (b) revisits to the locked composite-score formula, (c) plan revisions.
#
# Seeded with 7 of 20 (named in plan); user picks 13 more.
Cidade de Deus	2002	movie	tt0317248	# original→en, PT in originalTitle
Tropa de Elite	2007	movie	tt0861739	# original→en, PT in originalTitle
Bacurau	2019	movie	tt2762506	# primary same in PT/EN
Oppenheimer	2023	movie	tt15398776	# primary same in PT/EN
Interestelar	2014	movie	tt0816692	# PT-BR aka of Interstellar
Ainda Estou Aqui	2024	movie	tt14961016	# original→en, PT in originalTitle
Dune: Part Two	2024	movie	tt15239678	# canonical EN title
